title: Meet Alex: How the Barista FIRE Calculator Changed His Retirement Plan
description: One calculator session changed everything for Alex, age 30 with $150k saved. See how the Barista FIRE calculator reveals your part-time path to full retirement. barista fire calculator · barista fire · financial independence · retire early · fire success story
alt_text: Story pin featuring Alex, age 30, who used the Barista FIRE calculator to discover his two-phase retirement timeline.
